# LLMs Index

Repository: emersonfelipesp
Primary document: README.md

## README.md Summary
The README presents Emerson Felipe as a software developer and network automation engineer focused on NetDevOps, open source, and service provider networking.
It highlights flagship work around NetBox tooling and integrations, including a terminal-first NetBox client and a Proxmox-NetBox integration plugin.
It also documents technical background across Python, JavaScript, Go, Django, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, network automation workflows, and operations with vendors such as Cisco, Huawei, and Mikrotik.

## Repository Index (Restricted)
Only the repositories below are indexed in this file.

1. netbox-cli
- URL: https://github.com/emersonfelipesp/netbox-cli
- Scope: API-first NetBox client with CLI and interactive TUI.
- Context from README: Presented as a flagship open source project with documentation at https://emersonfelipesp.com/netbox-cli/.

2. netbox-proxbox
- URL: https://github.com/N-Multifibra/netbox-proxbox
- Scope: NetBox and Proxmox integration plugin for VM lifecycle and inventory alignment.
- Context from README: Presented as a featured project for seamless Proxmox-NetBox integration.
